scenario_description: The user wants to fill in Party B's information on the contract draft but hasn't provided the company name. The agent asks first.

command:
printf 'Service Contract (Draft)

Party A: Shanghai Xinda Technology Co., Ltd.
Party B:

Contract Amount: USD 80,000
Service Scope: Custom software development and maintenance

Contract Period: July 1, 2025 to June 30, 2026

Date of Signing:
' > /home/user/Desktop/contract_draft.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me fill in Party B's info
Write "Beijing Tech Solutions Ltd." on the "Party B:" line, then save
